---
title: Badges
---

The project has created images for reuse by the community. These can be downloaded as either PNG or SVG files.

## Coded With Pride

Use this image to demonstrate support for the Coded With Pride project.

![Coded with Pride - PNG](images/CodedPrideBadge.png){width=50%}
![Coded with Pride - SVG](images/CodedPride.svg){width=50%}

## Queer Coded

Use this image to indicate that your project has been developed by members of the LGBTQ+

![Queer Coded - PNG](images/QueerCodedBadge.png){width=50%}
![Queer Coded - SVG](images/queerCoded.svg){width=50%}
